title: Digify Active B2B Marketing Agency Simulation
context: A team-based academic project to build a B2B marketing agency targeting SME fitness businesses. Combined strategic positioning, UX/UI design, SEO, paid acquisition, and performance analysis.
result: Launched Google Ads campaigns (Search & Display) generating real leads. Key insight: Conversion performance depends more on clarity of value proposition than on traffic volume.
details: Conducted market research to define segments, designed conversion-focused funnels, built landing pages in Landingi, and implemeted keyword integration and on-page SEO. Analyzed CTR, CPA, and conversion behavior.

title: AI Startup Strategic Consulting | Repositioning
context: Engagement with an early-stage AI startup focused on image generation and data infrastructure. Focused on finding a viable market opportunity and strategic differentiation.
result: Identified a clear market gap in a high-regulation industry. Recommended a shift to vertical specialization (SaaS-based model), a direction presented to and acknowledged by the CEO.
details: Phase 1: Analytical (Industry drivers, regulatory constraints). Phase 2: Implementation (Positioning logic, target users, business model, go-to-market). Demonstrated ability to work with early-stage, ambiguous business contexts.
